hero.label: Frontend Developer · Buenos Aires
hero.name: Manuel Rodriguez Garcia
hero.valueProposition: I build memorable web interfaces that combine clarity, performance, and visual craft to earn trust and turn visits into opportunities.

profile.title: Profile
profile.label: About
profile.headline: <prim>A functional site is not enough.</prim> <grad>A memorable site, yes!</grad>
profile.line1: I help <accent>companies and founders</accent> earn trust online and turn visits into opportunities with clear, fast interfaces and obsessive attention to detail.
profile.line2: A site that represents your brand changes how users perceive you: <accent>fewer doubts</accent>, <accent>more inquiries</accent>, and above all more <accent>trust built</accent> in the user.
profile.line5: A page can be <accent>functional</accent> and still feel cold. I aim for <accent>memorable</accent> experiences where clear usability and visual craft work together, without giving up either.
profile.line6: I am known for <accent>attention to detail</accent> in web solutions: clean code, smooth interactions, and as a result a standout experience for users.

projects.label: Projects

process.title: Work process
process.label: How I work
process.description: A clear approach from understanding the problem to a polished delivery.

understand.title: Understand
understand.description: I analyze the problem, users, and project goals to define real priorities.

design.title: Design
design.description: I define structure, style, and experience with visual judgment and usability in mind.

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.description: I review accessibility, performance, and visual details before delivery.

points: Web application development using React JS
Collaboration with backend developers and UX designers
Participation in UX design and project decision-making
Editing and refining prototypes in Figma
Development of responsive interfaces using React, TypeScript, and JavaScript
Version control with Git and GitHub
Application of SOLID principles in personal projects
Website creation with WordPress, Elementor, and Shopify
Collaboration with AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, BlackBox)
